homepage.heroSubline: Protecting Bay Area homes with durable, beautiful siding solutions. RB Construction: Quality you can trust.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Craftsmanship, Rooted in San Francisco
aboutText: RB Construction General Contractor started with a simple goal: to provide San Francisco homeowners with reliable siding services built on integrity and quality. Founded by seasoned professionals with deep roots in the Bay Area construction scene, we understood the challenges our unique climate and housing stock presented. We're not just contractors; we're your neighbors.

Our approach is straightforward: meticulous planning, skilled execution, and open communication. We believe in doing the job right the first time, using only premium materials and proven techniques. We value transparency and strive to keep you informed every step of the way, ensuring your complete satisfaction.

As active members of the San Francisco community, we're committed to giving back. We regularly participate in local initiatives and support organizations that strengthen our neighborhoods. We believe in building not just better homes, but a better future for San Francisco.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation siding consultation. Call RB Construction now.

services.name: Siding Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert siding installation for lasting protection and enhanced curb appeal.
services.description:
Proper siding installation is crucial for protecting your San Francisco home from the elements and enhancing its aesthetic appeal. RB Construction offers comprehensive siding installation services, tailored to your specific needs and preferences. We work with a wide range of siding materials, including fiber cement, wood, vinyl, and metal, ensuring you find the perfect fit for your home's style and budget.

Our experienced team meticulously prepares the substrate, ensuring a smooth and even surface for optimal siding adhesion. We pay close attention to detail, properly flashing windows and doors, and sealing all seams to prevent water intrusion. We adhere to the highest industry standards, guaranteeing a durable and long-lasting siding installation that will protect your home for years to come. Whether it's a Victorian in the Mission or a modern home in SOMA, we are equipped to deliver the best.
process: Step 3: Old Siding Removal and Substrate Preparation
Step 4: Professional Siding Installation and Finishing

faq.question: What type of siding is best for San Francisco's climate?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding is highly recommended for San Francisco due to its durability, resistance to moisture, and ability to withstand temperature fluctuations. Vinyl siding is a cost effective option too. We can assess your home and provide a recommendation.

faq.question: How long does siding installation typically take?
faq.answer: The duration of siding installation depends on the size and complexity of the project. A typical project can take anywhere from 1-3 weeks. We'll give you a project timeline during the initial consultation.

faq.question: Do you offer warranties on your siding installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive warranties on both the siding materials and our workmanship, providing you with peace of mind and long-term protection for your investment.

services.name: Siding Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable siding repair services to protect your home from the elements.
services.description:
Damaged siding can compromise your home's protection and aesthetic appeal. RB Construction offers prompt and reliable siding repair services to address a wide range of issues, from minor cracks and dents to more extensive damage caused by weathering, pests, or impact. We understand the unique challenges San Francisco homes face, from the salty air near the coast to the seismic activity that can cause structural shifts.

Our skilled technicians will carefully assess the damage and recommend the most effective repair solution. We use high-quality materials that match your existing siding to ensure a seamless repair. We're experienced in repairing all types of siding, including wood, vinyl, fiber cement, and metal. Don't let damaged siding compromise your home's protection. Contact RB Construction for fast and reliable repair services to restore your home's beauty and integrity.

faq.question: How do I know if my siding needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs of siding damage include cracks, dents, warping, discoloration, and loose or missing pieces. If you notice any of these issues, contact us for an inspection.

faq.question: Can you match the color of my existing siding?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive resources to match the color and texture of your existing siding, ensuring a seamless repair that blends perfectly with your home's exterior.

faq.question: What types of siding do you repair?
faq.answer: We repair all types of siding, including wood, vinyl, fiber cement, and metal siding. Our technicians are experienced in handling a wide range of repair challenges.

services.name: Siding Replacement
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your home with premium siding replacement services.
services.description:
When siding is beyond repair or you're looking to upgrade your home's appearance and protection, RB Construction offers comprehensive siding replacement services. We'll guide you through the selection process, helping you choose the perfect siding material and style to match your vision and budget. San Francisco homes can benefit greatly from modern siding materials that offer improved insulation and weather resistance.

Our experienced team will carefully remove your old siding, prepare the substrate, and install your new siding with precision and attention to detail. We're committed to providing a seamless and stress-free siding replacement experience. Increase your home's value and curb appeal with new siding from RB Construction.
process: Step 2: Old Siding Removal and Disposal
Step 4: Professional Siding Installation and Finishing

faq.question: How often should I replace my siding?
faq.answer: The lifespan of siding depends on the material and environmental factors. Generally, vinyl siding lasts 20-40 years, wood siding lasts 20-30 years, and fiber cement siding lasts 50+ years.

faq.question: What are the benefits of replacing my siding?
faq.answer: Replacing your siding can improve your home's energy efficiency, increase its value, enhance its curb appeal, and protect it from the elements.

faq.question: Do you handle the disposal of the old siding?
faq.answer: Yes, we handle the removal and disposal of your old siding in an environmentally responsible manner.

services.name: Fiber Cement Siding
services.shortDescription: Durable and beautiful fiber cement siding installation and repair.
services.description:
Fiber cement siding is a popular choice for San Francisco homeowners due to its exceptional durability, resistance to moisture, and aesthetic versatility. RB Construction specializes in fiber cement siding installation and repair, providing expert services to enhance your home's protection and curb appeal. Fiber cement stands up to the Bay Area's diverse weather conditions, from foggy mornings to sunny afternoons.

We work with leading manufacturers to offer a wide range of fiber cement siding styles and colors, allowing you to customize your home's exterior. Our skilled technicians ensure precise installation, paying close attention to detail to create a seamless and long-lasting finish. Invest in the durability and beauty of fiber cement siding with RB Construction.

faq.question: What are the advantages of fiber cement siding?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding is highly durable, resistant to moisture, fire-resistant, and offers a wide range of styles and colors. It's a great option for San Francisco's climate.

faq.question: Is fiber cement siding more expensive than vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Yes, fiber cement siding is generally more expensive than vinyl siding, but it offers superior durability and longevity, making it a worthwhile investment.

faq.question: How long does fiber cement siding last?
faq.answer: Fiber cement siding can last 50+ years with proper installation and maintenance.

services.name: Vinyl Siding
services.shortDescription: Affordable and low-maintenance vinyl siding solutions.
services.description:
Vinyl siding is a cost-effective and low-maintenance option for San Francisco homeowners looking to enhance their home's appearance and protection. RB Construction offers professional vinyl siding installation and repair services, providing a wide range of styles and colors to choose from. Vinyl siding is particularly popular in neighborhoods with older homes that are looking to modernize their exteriors.

Our experienced team ensures proper installation, paying close attention to detail to create a seamless and weather-resistant finish. Vinyl siding is a practical and attractive choice for homeowners seeking a budget-friendly siding solution. Enjoy the benefits of low-maintenance and long-lasting vinyl siding with RB Construction.

faq.question: What are the benefits of vinyl siding?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding is affordable, low-maintenance, and available in a wide range of styles and colors. It's a great option for homeowners on a budget.

faq.question: How long does vinyl siding last?
faq.answer: Vinyl siding typically lasts 20-40 years with proper installation and maintenance.

faq.question: Is vinyl siding environmentally friendly?
faq.answer: Modern vinyl siding is recyclable and energy-efficient, making it a more environmentally friendly option than older vinyl products.

services.name: Wood Siding
services.shortDescription: Classic wood siding installation and repair for a timeless look.
services.description:
Wood siding offers a classic and timeless aesthetic that can enhance the beauty of any San Francisco home. RB Construction specializes in wood siding installation and repair, providing expert services to maintain the natural beauty and integrity of your home's exterior. From traditional clapboard to rustic shingle, we offer a variety of wood siding options to suit your style and budget. Many Victorian-era homes in San Francisco's historic districts feature wood siding, and we're experts at preserving their charm.

Our skilled craftsmen are experienced in working with all types of wood siding, ensuring proper installation and finishing for long-lasting protection. Preserve the timeless beauty of wood siding with RB Construction.

faq.question: What are the benefits of wood siding?
faq.answer: Wood siding offers a classic and natural aesthetic that can enhance the beauty of any home. It's also a renewable resource.

faq.question: How often does wood siding need to be maintained?
faq.answer: Wood siding requires regular maintenance, including painting or staining every 3-5 years, to protect it from the elements.

faq.question: What types of wood are best for siding?
faq.answer: Cedar and redwood are popular choices for wood siding due to their natural resistance to decay and insects.

serviceAreas.content:
RB Construction General Contractor is proud to offer our expert siding services to the residents and businesses of San Francisco. We understand the unique architectural styles and weather conditions of the city, and we tailor our siding solutions to meet these specific needs. From Victorian homes to modern buildings, we have the experience and expertise to enhance the beauty and protect the integrity of your property. 

We offer a wide range of siding options, including vinyl, wood, fiber cement, and metal, ensuring that you find the perfect fit for your aesthetic preferences and budget. Our team of skilled installers is committed to providing top-quality workmanship and exceptional customer service. We are dedicated to helping San Francisco homeowners and business owners improve the curb appeal and value of their properties with our durable and attractive siding solutions.

RB Construction General Contractor is familiar with the specific challenges and opportunities presented by each area of the city, ensuring a seamless and successful siding project.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: RB Construction did an amazing job installing new fiber cement siding on my Victorian in the Haight. The crew was professional, efficient, and the finished product looks fantastic. They really paid attention to the details and made sure everything was perfect. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: I had some damaged wood siding on my home in Noe Valley due to water damage. RB Construction came out quickly and repaired the siding seamlessly. You can't even tell there was any damage. Great service!

reviews.name: Jennifer L.
reviews.text: We recently hired RB Construction to replace the old vinyl siding on our home in the Sunset District. The team was very helpful in choosing a new siding style and color that complemented our home's architecture. The installation was smooth and the results are stunning!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: RB Construction installed fiber cement siding on my home. The team was knowledgeable and professional, and the siding looks great. I feel much more confident about the protection of my home now.

reviews.name: Susan H.
reviews.text: Had a few shingles missing after a storm. RB Construction took care of it quickly and professionally. Very reliable and reasonably priced.

reviews.name: Robert G.
reviews.text: RB Construction installed new vinyl siding on my garage. The work was done quickly and efficiently, and the price was very competitive. I'm very happy with the results!
